name: customer_connect
description: E2E Automation Suite — Customer Portal QA

scripts.run:login: npx playwright test tests/login.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=Login
scripts.run:dashboard: npx playwright test tests/dashboard.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=Dashboard
scripts.run:createticket: npx playwright test tests/createTicket.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=CreateTicket
scripts.run:all: npx playwright test --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=All
scripts.regression:login: npx playwright test tests/login.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=Login --regression
scripts.regression:dashboard: npx playwright test tests/dashboard.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=Dashboard --regression
scripts.regression:createticket: npx playwright test tests/createTicket.spec.js --config playwright.config.js && node utils/generate-report.js --feature=CreateTicket --regression
